title: Kusum Dola
desc: Ranajay and Iman get married under circumstances beyond their control. Although they eventually fall in love, the pair continues to struggle with persistent marital strife continues.

title: Tumi Chherona Haat Pothe
desc: Cousins Moni and Rashi marry into the wealthy Modak family, seemingly living a dream. However, Moni soon finds herself battling conspiracies from unexpected quarters.

title: Bholebaba Paar Karega
desc: Jill, a young woman from a middle-class family, aspires to become a rapper and the voice of the marginalised. However, the domestic conditions at her home hold her back.

title: Compass
desc: Compass, a fearless girl in college, helps friends tackle personal and academic dilemmas while discovering unexpected twists when a new student joins.

title: Lokkhi Jhnapi
desc: A determined young woman strives to restore her family's honour by establishing a bank while navigating complex relationships and societal challenges.

title: O Mor Dorodiya
desc: Bani blames Aniruddha for her ruined life after a birth swap. She seeks justice while hidden truths threaten to shatter their fragile bond.

title: Rangamati Tirandaj
desc: Rangamati has exceptional archery skills, despite using her primitive bow. While she strives to make ends meet, a rich lady gifts her a professional bow to fuel her passions.

title: Parashuram
desc: Parashuram, a mild-mannered family man, leads a double life as an undercover agent, without the knowledge of his wife and children.

title: Professor Bidya Banerjee
desc: Bidya works as an anatomy professor and a nighttime vigilante. She applies classroom knowledge to deliver justice, one bone at a time.

title: Gangaa
desc: A dog's presence taints Gangaa and Ammaji's purity following their ritual bath. Later, after a cat infiltrates the storeroom and ruins the food supplies, Ammaji lashes out at Madhvi.

title: Mann Kee Awaaz Pratigya
desc: This is TV Show - Drama Category

title: Chiroshokha
desc: Following her husband's death, Kamalini, a devoted mother, assumes all family responsibilities. In this challenging journey, she finds support solely from Swatantra, her late husband's closest friend.

title: Sudhu Tomari Jonyo
desc: Rahi plans to stay in India while Titli dreams of America. Rahul desires Titli, but Rahi has feelings for Rahul, creating a complex love triangle.

title: Milon Hobe Kotodine
desc: Elaa, an enthusiastic matchmaker, ignites an unlikely romance with Gora, a cynical heir, at the grand opening of a luxury brand's dating app, challenging destiny itself.
